name: 女主霸氣護夫反擊原生家庭
name_en: Heroine's Fierce Counterattack Against Birth Family
description: 面對曾經拋棄她的父親動手打人，女主直接還擊並威脅斷手，男主配合演戲不作證，夫妻聯手打臉惡父的場面極其解氣。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on... Oh, oops. I just got something in my eye. Didn't see a thing. My apologies. However, Mr. G, if you file a false police report, be careful you don't get locked up.
